notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG downside-beta basket from approved card HOLLSTEIN-DOWNBETA-2021_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1 and evaluate the paired package rather than standalone legs. At each broker-month transition, use 252 synchronized completed D1 returns, define downside observations as SP500 returns strictly below their full-window mean, require at least 100 such observations, estimate each energy leg's downside beta to read-only SP500.DWX, buy lower beta, short higher beta, split fixed package risk equally, and apply frozen ATR hard stops. SP500.DWX is a read-only factor and must never be traded. The broad-futures source, insignificant source spread, two-energy-CFD narrowing, custom-symbol factor, continuous-CFD basis, gaps, and legging are binding Q02 falsification risks; no portfolio admission or decorrelation is claimed.
